Text for core dump

Hello. I have problem with "FreeBSD nas 10.3-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE #0: Fri Oct  7 21:12:56 YEKT 2016     nas@nas:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/nasv3  amd64"

Kernel panic is repeated at intervals of 2-3 days. At first I thought that the problem is in the hardware, but the problem did not go away after replacing the server platform. 

If you need the core-files and for more information, contact me.
